title: Auto-detect ambiguous adjectives in checklist documents
description: Enhance checklist soft check #1 to automatically scan document content for ambiguous adjectives (fast, user-friendly, robust, scalable, flexible, intuitive, powerful, simple, easy, seamless). Each match is reported with line context. Transforms a soft (manual) check into a mechanical (auto-detected) check.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
